description: This email template is designed to support non-profit organizations in their fundraising efforts for World Water Day 2022. The theme centers around the critical issue of clean water and its relationship with global warming and pollution. The design, inspired by Earth Day, emphasizes environmental activism and the urgent need for collective action against climate change. The dark mode aesthetic enhances readability, making it easier for recipients to engage with the content. This template is ideal for global observances and celebrations, particularly those focused on environmental preservation and sustainability. Use it to inspire your audience to participate in your World Water Day initiatives and make a difference.
short_description: Join the fight against water scarcity with our 2022 fundraising initiative email template. Perfect for non-profits and activists, it raises awareness about clean water's role in combating global warming and climate change. Ideal for Earth Day and World Water Day celebrations.

designer.description:
I believe in the role of design as a facilitating agent that works in the exchange of experience between people, brands and companies. I am deeply passionate about telling unique stories.

I help brands deliver experiences that become new ways of interaction, participation and engagement between companies and customers.

html_data:
WORLD WATER DAY

World Water Day celebrates water and raises awareness of the 2.2 billion people living without access to safe water. It is about taking action to tackle the global water crisis. A core focus of World Water Day is to support the achievement of Sustainable Development Goal 6: water and sanitation for all by 2030.

 
LEARN MORE
 
 

Inadequate water supply and lack of sanitation is a major issue for many developing countries.

 

Water is a fundamental resource for all human beings. It is the most important aspect of life, and yet there are many countries that are facing water scarcity and pollution.

 
 

1.8 billion

people will live without access to safe drinking water and 2.6 billion people will live without access to adequate sanitation.

 
 

This means that one in every six people on this planet will have no clean water to drink or use for basic hygiene.

 
 

How to donate?

Water is a precious commodity. In 2020 alone, COVID-19 has caused many people to be displaced from their homes, leaving them with limited access to clean water. 

HOW CAN I HELP?

Save water
Take shorter showers
Check your toilet for leaks
 

HELP NOW

 
DONATE NOW
 
 
 

Follow us
